_notes: Checkpoint outputs/pi05 (samithva/pi05_stack_cup_bowl) was trained with lerobot v0.5.1 + transformers 5.3.0; BOTH must match exactly.
transformers 5.5.x loads and runs but SILENTLY ignores vision/state inputs (nMAE 0.96 vs 0.03) — must be 5.3.0.
Activate lerobot_pi05 before starting the server; it must provide lerobot v0.5.1 and transformers 5.3.0.
Configure offline Hugging Face cache variables in that environment when required.
pi05 image keys are the raw camera names, hence the identity camera_map.
See README 'This machine's setup notes' for the full story.
compile=0: eager serving measured FASTER than torch.compile for RTC (0.19s vs 3.4s/predict; autograd guidance breaks the compiled graph) and kills the 15-20s cold start. See README RTC section.
